examples: "It's the tincture of benzoin, " he said, "Rodeo cowboys use it while riding a bull or a bronc."
I'd say he is a man who has the least tincture of learning.
THERE is no great genius without a tincture of madness.
The herb is available as dried leaves and flowers, a concentrated liquid or tincture extract, in capsules and ointment and prepared tea.
It is available in capsules and tablets, as well as bedtime teas and a tincture, a liquid you can put under your tongue or mix with water.
